en.extract:
The red-headed malimbe (Malimbus rubricollis) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.
It is native to the African tropical rainforest.

[[File:Red-headed Malimbe juv 111ND500 DSC9727.jpg|thumb|Red-headed Malimbe, juvenile]]
The '''red-headed malimbe''' ('''''Malimbus rubricollis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]].
It is native to the [[Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests|African tropical rainforest]].
